notes.content: UC Santa Cruz students may complete one or more minors, provided they can finish all required coursework within their maximum enrollment terms and credit limits. Minors are recorded on the official transcript but do not appear on the diploma. Pursuing a minor is optional and should align with a student’s academic interests and career goals. Students do not apply for minors as part of their UC Santa Cruz admission application. Transfer students interested in a minor should reach out to the department that offers it for advising during their first quarter of enrollment.
notes.contentHtml:
UC Santa Cruz students may complete one or more minors, provided they can finish all required coursework within their maximum enrollment terms and credit limits. Minors are recorded on the official transcript but do not appear on the diploma. Pursuing a minor is optional and should align with a student’s academic interests and career goals.


Students do not apply for minors as part of their UC Santa Cruz admission application. Transfer students interested in a minor should reach out to the department that offers it for advising during their first quarter of enrollment.

notes.content: Transfer students interested in this minor are encouraged to complete the articulated equivalents of the following THREE course requirements prior to transfer: ONE lower-division Jewish studies core course (section A below) TWO lower-division electives (section B below)* *May be additional core courses from section A Refer to the " Preparation for the Minor " section below for courses approved to articulate to these requirements. Visit the Jewish Studies website to learn more about this minor. UC Santa Cruz General Catalog: Jewish Studies Minor Program Statement
notes.contentHtml:
Transfer students interested in this minor are encouraged to complete the articulated equivalents of the following THREE course requirements prior to transfer:


  • ONE lower-division Jewish studies core course (section A below)
  • TWO lower-division electives (section B below)*

*May be additional core courses from section A


Refer to the "Preparation for the Minor" section below for courses approved to articulate to these requirements.



Visit the Jewish Studies website to learn more about this minor.

UC Santa Cruz General Catalog: Jewish Studies Minor Program Statement
